chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 78 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 23.12.2022 Applicant Abdul Ghaffar Panhwar, present in person. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This Criminal Transfer Application has been filed for transfer of Sessions Case No. 511 of 2016 (Re: The State v. Kamran & others), arising out of Crime No. 33 of 2016 of Police Station Gambat, registered for offences under Sections 324, 337-H, 148, 149, P.P.C., from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Gambat to any other Court having jurisdiction. The sole ground taken by the applicant is that the said Court is lying vacant. The applicant, who is complainant of aforementioned FIR, states that he would be satisfied and will not press instant Criminal Transfer Application, if directions are given to the Incharge Judge of the trial Court to conclude the trial expeditiously and preferably within a period of three months hereof or in case any Presiding Officer is posed in the trial Court, he may proceed with the matter and decide the same within aforementioned stipulated period. Order accordingly. Instant Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
